title: Cobblemon BattleCam
description: This mod adds a cinematic camera to the battles, just like in the main games.
body:
Cobblemon BattleCam is a Fabric client-side cinematic camera mod built specifically for Cobblemon battles. When a battle is active, it switches to dynamic cinematic shots around trainers and Pokemon, with smooth motion and automatic focus changes to keep combat visually clear and dramatic. The system supports custom Blockbench camera animations, prioritizes battle-tagged animations based on battle context, and can generate procedural fallback shots when no matching animation is found.

Key Features:

Automatic cinematic camera during active Cobblemon battles
Dynamic focus system (global, trainers, or Pokemon) with rotating shot styles
Smooth camera motion with configurable speed and distance profile
Trainer visibility control during battle camera mode
Battle-context animation selection via tags (single, double, triple, multi/rotation, wild/trainer, dynamax, raid)
Procedural fallback camera shots when no suitable tagged animation exists
In-game configuration support with YACL and Mod Menu
